title: Which Animal is the Most Efficient Traveler?
description:
This chart shows how efficiently all animals travel, including you! 

The closer to the top, the more energy the animal uses, and the farther to the right, the bigger it is. And it turns out you, a human, are pretty darn efficient. 

To find out what's more efficient than a human, subscribe!

#human #energy #science #shorts #animation
